---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Include:

- API design (if applicable)
- Algorithm changes (if applicable)
- Expected behaviour

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Provide a concrete use case or example:

```python
# Example of how the feature would be used
from fdmm import DynamicMaximalMatching

algo = DynamicMaximalMatching(n=100, mode="basic")
# New feature usage...
```

## Fidelity Impact

If this relates to the paper reproduction, note:

- [ ] This improves fidelity to the paper
- [ ] This is an engineering improvement (out of scope for baseline)
- [ ] This is a new extension

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have clearly described the motivation and use case
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)
